mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, status, create_time, failed_attempts, lock_time, nick_name, CASE WHEN lock_time IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(0, 7200 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW())) END AS lock_remaining_seconds FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, status, create_time, nick_name) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{nick_name})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET failed_attempts = failed_attempts + 1, lock_time = CASE WHEN lock_time IS NULL AND (failed_attempts + 1) >= #{maxAttempts} THEN NOW() ELSE lock_time END WHERE username = #{username} AND (lock_time IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) >= #{lockDurationSeconds})
